name: editor4c: mention toolbar inserts an inline mention atom via window.prompt
_note: Phase B — mention gesture through window.prompt. The toolbar Insert-mention button calls `window.prompt('Mention:', 'alice')` then `cmdInsertInlineAtom(s, 'mention', [{name:'label', value:name}])`, inserting a selectable inline atom at the caret. `set_prompt` seeds the answer (headless has no dialog). Click into a paragraph to place the caret, seed the name, click the button → a `.rdt-mention` atom labeled with the seeded name appears. The seed doc has no mentions, so a count of 1 is unambiguous.
